title: Stratospherical Expansion
description: Completely overhauling the Overworld with new sky island terrain generation and custom biomes.
body:
Stratospherical Expansion is a mod which completely overhauls the overworld generation to be made of sky islands. It also features completely reimagined vanilla biomes.
Requires Terrablender

!!! OUTDATED: Use the OG Stratospherical preset in Ecospherical Expansion (https://modrinth.com/mod/ecospherical-expansion) instead of this mod. Note: That is only available in 1.20.x. Fabric/Forge!!!

Discord: https://discord.gg/HHqKa8vTAN
This mod may be used in any modpack.
